verse.name: v1
verse.lines: When I think of heaven and all the sights I'll see The walls of Jasper, gates of pearl, the clear and golden street Why should I be present? Why should I enter in? After all the sinful living, and the wicked one I've been

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: In the presence of Jehovah, I stand before the throne The accusers of the brethren starts to read the things I've done As I hear that awful charges the question fills my mind Why should I not be put in hell to suffer for all time?

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: It's through the blood, that's all I have to plea It's through the blood, that Jesus shed for me Not by works of my own righteousness for filthy rags are they But because of that old rugged tree hanging on dark Calvary That is my only plea it's through the blood

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: When I'm walking through a valley, and I feel there's no way out When the winds of sorrow threaten me and they turn my world around That's when I look to Jesus, and the price He paid for me I can lift my hands in praise to Him and shout the victory
